criteria.name: Compilation
criteria.description: The original code compiles and runs without errors. 10 points are deducted from compilation if there are any syntax error in the original code

criteria.name: Test 1
criteria.description: The code with the specified input returns the expected output

criteria.name: Test 2
criteria.description: The code with the specified input returns the expected output

criteria.name: Test 3
criteria.description: The code with the specified input returns the expected output

criteria.name: Test 4
criteria.description: The code with the specified input returns the expected output

criteria.name: Final Grade
criteria.description: This is the total points based on the points from the other criteria. The final grade is out of 100 points. Calculate it by adding Compilation earned points + Test1 Earned Points + Test2 Earned Points + Test3 Earned Points + Test4 Earned Points
